rulings.Case Title: GEORGE LUCAS,JR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION For Entry Of A Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, October 20, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Aerojet-General Corp.¿s amended motion for a protective order: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:15am in Dept. 503. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE LUCAS,JR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs¿ Motion To Compel Defendant Gencorp, Inc. To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition Is Continued On The Court¿S Own Motion To October 20, 2011 At 9:00 A.M. In Department 503.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, October 20, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant GenCorp, Inc. to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition was granted by the court and the court set a compliance hearing. The compliance hearing will be at 9:15am in Dept. 503. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE LUCAS,JR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs¿ Motion To Compel Aerojet-General Corp. To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition, Pursuant To The July 5, 2011 Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, October 20, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Aerojet-General Corp. to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition, pursuant to the July 5, 2011 subpoena was granted by the court and the court set a compliance hearing. The compliance hearing will be at 9:15am in Dept. 503. = (503/TLJ)
